backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for a clothing store backend, managing products, carts, orders, user profiles, and static store content with role-based access control (admin/user) via an AccessControl mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the fix for the Admin panel link in UserDropdown, covering the four audited layers: backend endpoint, useIsCallerAdmin hook, React Query cache behavior, and conditional rendering.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing one-to-two sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a build/documentation reference for the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens (background, foreground, accent, etc.) for both light and dark modes using CSS custom properties.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounts the React app via the /src/main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with eight routes (home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin, about) all nested under the Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer component with logo, collections list, and a Studio column where 'About Us' is a TanStack Router Link; includes a caffeine.ai attribution with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with desktop category navigation, a centered logo, cart icon with item count badge, a UserDropdown for auth, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, a TanStack Router Outlet for page content, and a Footer in a full-height flex column.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Standalone login/logout button component using Internet Identity; shows a spinner during login and clears the React Query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, name, price, and available sizes, including a hover-triggered quick-add-to-cart button with loading and out-of-stock states.
frontend/src/components/UserDropdown.tsx: Displays a login button for unauthenticated users or an authenticated user dropdown menu with profile name, admin panel link (if admin), and logout option.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity state management via AuthClient, exposed through a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including products, cart, orders, user profiles, and admin operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global styles including Google Fonts imports, Tailwind directives, and a warm neutral CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Provides utility functions and constants including class merging, INR price formatting, and category label/slug/image mappings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the About Us page, fetching store content via a query hook and splitting it into paragraphs, with skeleton loading states and static fallback text.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing products (add/edit/delete) and store content, with image compression via Canvas API, form validation, and admin access control using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Shopping cart page that displays cart items with quantity controls and removal, computing line totals using product data fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Product catalog page that displays products filtered by category slug, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, and empty/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Checkout page that collects customer name and delivery address, validates inputs, places an order from cart items, and navigates to an order confirmation page on success.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page featuring a hero image, dynamic brand statement text from store content, and a grid of category cards that navigate to the catalog, with skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Displays a post-purchase confirmation page showing a success icon, thank-you message, and optional order reference ID extracted from URL search params, with links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Renders a full product detail page with image, size selection, and add-to-cart functionality, fetching product data by ID and handling loading, error, and out-of-stock states.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), an oklch-based color system, custom shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations for the Dhimayu Studio frontend.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and state for Dhimayu Studio, recording existing features, known issues (admin dropdown link not appearing), and fix request flags at schema version 1.0.0.
